things.name: Borobudur Temple
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage world's largest Buddhist temple - a 9th-century mandala of stone

things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 9th-century Hindu temple compound with towering Shiva shrines

things.name: Sunrise at Borobudur from Punthuk Setumbu
things.description: Magical sunrise view of Borobudur rising through morning mist above the jungle

things.description: Pre-dawn 4WD up the flanks of the world's most active volcano

things.name: Malioboro Street
things.description: Yogya's main street - batik fabrics, silver jewellery, leather wayang puppets

things.name: Wayang Kulit Shadow Puppet Show
things.description: All-night Javanese shadow puppet performance at the Kraton

things.name: Batik Workshop
things.description: Yogyakarta is the home of Javanese batik - learn the wax-resist technique

things.name: Ratu Boko Palace Ruins
things.description: Hilltop royal compound with sunset views over the temple-dotted plain

things.name: Gudeg
things.description: Yogya's signature dish - young jackfruit slow-cooked in coconut milk for 24 hours
